_comment: VENDORS.md (plural, backslash path) declares lib/widget.min.js from an unpinned unpkg URL. The minified file is recognized as vendored, so missing-library / minified-code / obfuscated-code / code-sanity skip it; unpinned-vendor-source rejects the non-pinned source, anchored to the VENDORS.md line that cites it (with the URL on the locus line) - decided offline, no fetch. bg.js imports the lib, so unused-files leaves it alone.
